title: heliophila diffusa subsp. flacca
intro: Heliophila diffusa subsp. flacca, also known as the "Hare's Ear" or "African Heliophila," is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Heliophila diffusa subsp. flacca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
